title: My Mom Tricked Me, Sold My Inheritance While I Was Deployed. So I Bought It Back And Said No.
description: My mother used a power of attorney to sell my grandmother's house while I served overseas. A decade later, after a stroke left her desperate to move in, I revealed I had bought it at auction and given it to a deserving family. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #AITA
thumb_text: I BOUGHT MY GRANDMA'S HOUSE BACK AND SAID NO

thumb_lines.text: SPENT EVERY CENT ON HERSELF AND MY BROTHER
A DECADE LATER SHE BEGGED TO MOVE IN
I BOUGHT IT BACK AND REFUSED HER
